name: Empress Spinach Salad B1
recipeIngredient: 2 slices Bacon, crisp-cooked, finely chopped (reserve bacon fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash spinach carefully several times to remove all sand. Alternatively, buy pre-washed and trimmed fresh spinach, give it a quick wash, and dry well.
2. Place spinach in a bowl.
3. Add pimientos, bacon, and eggs to the spinach.
4. In a separate bowl, combine olive oil and wine vinegar.
5. Add salt, pepper, garlic, anchovies, and lemon juice to the dressing mixture.
6. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
7. When ready to serve, discard any remaining bits of garlic.
8. Pour the reserved bacon fat into the dressing and stir until blended.
9. Pour the dressing over the spinach, toss well, and serve cold.
